summary: Scoped verification of two SEO/robots edits: (a) removal of aggregateRating from LocalBusiness JSON-LD in /app/frontend/public/index.html, (b) removal of 'Disallow: /favorites' from /app/frontend/public/robots.txt. All 30 assertions across static file parsing, dynamic sitemap HTTP fetch, and live Playwright navigation to /favorites and /catalog PASSED. No transactional endpoints were touched; no admin auth was attempted.
critical_code_review_comments: Note (informational, NOT part of scope): The Twitter meta description at index.html line 46 still reads '4.9★ · 236+ Google reviews.' This is outside the LocalBusiness JSON-LD block and was not in scope of this task; flagging for owner awareness only in case the marketing copy should also be revisited for consistency with the removed aggregateRating.
test_credentials: N/A - public endpoints and public files only
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 29 verified the two-line diff: aggregateRating removed from LocalBusiness JSON-LD (index.html) and 'Disallow: /favorites' removed from robots.txt. /favorites now emits meta robots noindex,follow at runtime and is not present in either static or dynamic sitemap. Verification script lives at /app/tests/verify_seo_scoped.py and can be re-run standalone (python tests/verify_seo_scoped.py). Twitter description on line 46 of index.html still says '4.9★ · 236+ Google reviews' — explicitly out of scope for iteration 29; do not modify without instruction.
